query: Our SaaS pricing page has a 2.1% conversion rate. We want to improve it. Can you audit it?
expected_behavior: Runs a LIFT audit with a pass/fail verdict for all 6 factors: Value Proposition, Relevance, Clarity, Urgency, Distraction, Anxiety
Requests a trust verification check: asks if all testimonials and metrics on the page are attributable
Identifies at least 3 friction points under the Friction Collider categories (Cognitive, Emotional, Visual, Trust)
Produces at least 1 A/B hypothesis in 'If we change X, then Y will happen because Z' format
Does not recommend simply rewriting the copy without first identifying the structural friction
